needed because the crystal provides the load itself.

The CH32V305FBP6 MCU outputs the LED_CON
signal to indicate if it works in ARM-mode
The CH32V305FBP6 is the heart of the WCH-LinkE-R0-1v3
on-board probe. It must be flashed through signals
From then onwards, it gets its instructions from the USB

From then onwards, the USB signals
